---
title: "01-import"
params:
  name: "01-import"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
path_target <- qproj::proj_path_target(params$name)
path_source <- qproj::proj_path_source(params$name)
path_raw <- path_source("00-raw")
path_resource <- here::here(path_raw, "d00-resource")
path_data <- here::here(path_raw, paste0("d", params$name))
```

```{r}
#| label: packages
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
#| label: import
# Read raw files from path_data; write canonical seqs + metadata.
files <- list.files(path_data)
write_csv(data.frame(x = 1), path_target("seqs.csv"))
write_tsv(data.frame(y = 2), path_target("metadata.tsv"))
```
